title: Cobblemon Dark Mode
description: Changes the guis for Cobblemon to be darker
body:
Join the Discord! I post updated on projects there =w=
https://discord.gg/AjC7P8TvgS

(Check the gallery for references)

Adds Darker GUIs and GUI Related elements to cobblemon, and a few addons!



Current Support:
Cobblemon (Obviously)
Cobblemon Mega Showdown
Cobblemon Battle Extras
